description:
Standardize Section Background Styling to Match Visit-CTA Component

Update section background styling to use consistent rounded corners matching the existing visit-cta component design pattern.

Requirements:
- Apply same border-radius values used in visit-cta component to the target section
- Ensure rounded corners are visible and properly rendered on all screen sizes
- Match any additional styling from visit-cta such as padding, shadows, or background colors if applicable
- Verify visual consistency across different browsers and devices
- Identify which specific section(s) need this styling applied
- Consider responsive behavior - adjust border-radius on mobile if needed
- Ensure content within the section respects the rounded boundaries (no overflow issues)
title: Standardize section background styling with rounded corners
